title: Reis personality
wikitext:
[]: Rei's personality [Spoilers]             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Sat Jul 25, 2009 5:51 am Well, for starters, Rei is starting to have a social life - yeepieee! [Smiley train obliterated. See your PMs.] she eats with other people, she says thank you, she cooks food and in Misato's theory, she's falling in love. I think Rei has a better image in rebuild than in the series. she has the human touch, unlike in the series, all blank and pale. i'm starting to think that her charater in rebuild came from her character in Sadamoto's manga. i'm starting to like Rei's character. how about you guys, any comments?

[]:             Quote Post by Desty_Nova » Sat Jul 25, 2009 7:03 am It'll be a cold day in hell before Rei gets a break, she's just being set up for something unspeakably horrible to happen to her.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jul 25, 2009 7:32 am Well, even in the original anime, she had this "learning about emotions" thing going on, only it was far more subtle, slower, and it was ultimately revealed that there is a part of her existence which is just not human (personal opinion). In Rebuild though, she has really been taking the steps toward becoming a more emotional, human character in strides. So much so, in fact, that, by the end of 2.0, IMO this line of her character development was completed. I mean she was throwing parties, said "Arigato" to a lot of people, worded her feelings for Shinji when Asuka questioned her, and in the final scene, she accepted her own uniqueness as a person when Shinji offered her his hand. And... where to go from with becoming human from here? I mean sure, the thought of Shinji and Rei being together and all WAFF-y is nice and romantic, and might even turn out to be a possible conclusion, but they can't do that *during* 3.0/4.0 since there is this (supposedly) apocalyptic plot moving. So my gut instinct tells me that her and (even more so) Shinji are being set up for some incredible plot delivered bitchslap regarding their relationship (pointing out: Gendo talking about needing to get Shinji and Rei closer to each other) and Rei's origins. Also, my even gutter instinct tells me that Kaworu delivering his own personal brand of happiness to Shinji will somehow involve him disposing (or at least trying to) of Rei, but that's high grade bullshit speculation. Before anyone gets their hopes up reading this post (not like i'm some authority): NO , A/S at this point is pretty much impossible. There is no time, the characters are on completely different roads, and generally, just no. 


[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jul 25, 2009 7:41 am if Anno follows this ReiXShinji kawaii desu desu ^____^ through without subverting it (2.0's ending certainly made me believe even more that inescapable subversion will come up) in 3.0/4.0 I'll go batshit insane and declare RoE worst shit since Sadamoto's fan fiction. Subverting whole "silent girl learns to become human" and trolling us with false hints (the smile in ep 6, Arigato in ep 17 being biggest ones) was one of most clever deconstructionist things NGE did. Then when we get to Rei's symbolism, purpose etc. within the show it becomes painfully obvious SxR ending would've been just wrong. Unless Rei's origins/symbolism/etc are *seriously* revamped (which has not yet happened in any way and 2.0 just went out prove that most important aspect - being clone of Yui - has not changed) ReiXShinji ending would be catasrophical bullshit on Sadamoto's levels. Luckily I don't think that's what is going to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Jul 25, 2009 8:23 am Desty_Nova wrote: It'll be a cold day in hell before Rei gets a break, she's just being set up for something unspeakably horrible to happen to her.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Sat Jul 25, 2009 9:11 am @SaltyJoe: you do have a point with gendou planning to get Rei closer to Shinji... i say it can be possible. we'll never know if it's all part of gendou's plan. @Xard: that's a good one cuz i remember gendou looking at Rei, and afterwards, yui's face shows up.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Jul 25, 2009 10:39 am I get the feeling Rei is finally getting ON SCREEN the character development that got pushed aside and/or supposedly happened mostly offscreen in NGE after episode 6. I'm thinking, for eample, of the short DC scene where Asuka sees Shinji and Rei chatting quite amiably with each other while - I think - waiting for their train... as if it were the most natural thing in the world for the two of them to just hang out together like that. As if, there had been quite a bit of contact between them going on off screen besides and/or after the things we actually saw happen in the actual episodes. I'm thinking the way Shinji seems to feel comfortable enough to tiptoe into Rei's house and clean it up a few episodes earlier might support this. I might have the chronology wrong here, but while there had been scenes of them interacting between that and episode 6 (like the elevator scene) their interaction there had still seemed a tad awkward. That's just my impression anyway (please don't hurt me! ) One of the changes I liked in Rebuild was the way they changed the set up for Rei's expression of gratitude. Somehow, the way they handled it with Shinji offering her food aka nurture, instead of just having him clean up her trash, seemed a lot more appropriate (Touji's comments about manly behavior where adapted to the new context too, and I think it worked pretty well so that part of his development wasn't lost...) I do remember thinking the trash-cleaning bit felt a tad anti-climatic to be the lead-in (so to speak) to such a huge breakthrough for her character... Also. Rei's face after tasting miso soup for the first time is teh cutest thing since Touji's sister! xD

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 25, 2009 10:46 am Desty_Nova wrote: she's just being set up for something unspeakably horrible to happen to her.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Jul 25, 2009 10:47 am Rei is Human, Lilith IS what Human is. Rei's character from NGE is what truly makes her up. Other Anime characters have been based around her NGE character such as that girl from Harohi or however you spell it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jul 25, 2009 10:59 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: One more thing before I forget: one of the Newtype (Japan or USA?) articles when 1.0 was first coming out said that "Rei and Kaworu would be lead characters in Rebuild" or some such thing. I guess this is Anno's approach to doing that.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jul 25, 2009 11:22 am It's becoming apparent Rei is the key relationship for Shinji in the Rebuildverse. But they're gonna have to work hard to not make Kaworu become some kind've Exposition Robot in 3.0 + 4.0 where he just explains everything that's been left unsaid. In Anno I trust.

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Sat Jul 25, 2009 11:30 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: It's becoming apparent Rei is the key relationship for Shinji in the Rebuildverse. But they're gonna have to work hard to not make Kaworu become some kind've Exposition Robot in 3.0 + 4.0 where he just explains everything that's been left unsaid. In Anno I trust.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jul 25, 2009 2:20 pm Also, my even gutter instinct tells me that Kaworu delivering his own personal brand of happiness to Shinji will somehow involve him disposing (or at least trying to) of Rei, but that's high grade bullshit speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Jul 25, 2009 2:59 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Anyone else having this cute image of Kaworu and Rei fighting over Shinji and tugging on his arms and stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jul 25, 2009 4:29 pm Hehe. I can see it. But this is Rebuild so that would mean after a few seconds of tugging Shinji would BURST in a massive gusher of blood like some kind of massive popped tick.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sat Jul 25, 2009 5:10 pm Rei has always been my favorite chracter. Now with this... I don't know. I like it, but kind of loathe it at the same time

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat Jul 25, 2009 7:16 pm One of the things I am liking about Rebuild is Rei's development. Its interesting and nice to see how shes starting to open up and live as a human. One thing I've noticed is that there are some subtle changes for the relationship between Rei and Shinji. Besides, the fact that theres more focus on the growth of the relationship, in Rebuild, it also feels more genuine. While their are still hints between Rei=Yui, most of the hints aren't observed by Shinji. In the original series (and a little in the manga), it felt like Shinji was only drawn to Rei because he was reminded of his mom. I'm not saying that he doesn't see a connection between Rei and his mom in Rebuild, but it feels more like hes interested in Rei as a person instead of being reminded of his mom. I (and some other people) noticed that they cut out the scene where Rei flashsbacks to Gendo saving her, when Shinji opens up her entry plug. It gives off the idea that Rei sees Shinji for himself, than just being seen as a reflection of Gendo. Speaking of, a lot of those little hints between Rei and motherly behavior has also been taken out. There hasn't been any scene where Shinji is reminded of a mother when Rei wrings a wash cloth. Also, there isn't any scene where Rei repeats Yui when saying, "Well, thats good for you." Taking these elements out feel like the creators are trying to make Rei not a reflection of Yui, but her own person. So much so, in fact, that, by the end of 2.0, IMO this line of her character development was completed. I mean she was throwing parties, said "Arigato" to a lot of people, worded her feelings for Shinji when Asuka questioned her, and in the final scene, she accepted her own uniqueness as a person when Shinji offered her his hand. And... where to go from with becoming human from here?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 25, 2009 7:41 pm It seems like there are trying to make Rei her own person instead of just a Yui/Lilith clone yes (which is really nice considering Rei seemed to hate the fact she wasn't her own person), however... The Goose wrote: most of the hints aren't observed by Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat Jul 25, 2009 8:02 pm What I meant was that Shinji doesn't seem to being seeing his mom in Rei or mother like behavior like in the original series. Of the examples that you listed, only one was observed by Shinji and something he made note of. That whole train scene is never elaborated upon by him, plus its hard to say what that whole scene meant. Finally, the dinner discussion was seen by Gendo, not Shinji. So, most of the hints between Rei=Yui weren't seen or noticed by Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jul 25, 2009 8:11 pm That's propably due to limited time to be used. The "smell of mother" stuff makes it obvious Shinji is somewhat conscious about this.
